'''鈭歝h-l-d''' ('''kachalad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ponify|ponify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-l-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ponify|ponify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-l-d
|-
! Lemma
| kachalad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichalad|thichalad]] || [[word:jichalad|jichalad]] || [[word:shichalad|shichalad]] || [[word:kichalad|kichalad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchalad|thuthuchalad]] || [[word:jujuchalad|jujuchalad]] || [[word:shushuchalad|shushuchalad]] || [[word:kukuchalad|kukuchalad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchalad|thuchalad]] || [[word:juchalad|juchalad]] || [[word:shuchalad|shuchalad]] || [[word:kuchalad|kuchalad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchalad|thuchalad]] || [[word:juchalad|juchalad]] || [[word:shuchalad|shuchalad]] || [[word:kuchalad|kuchalad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechalad|thechalad]] || [[word:jechalad|jechalad]] || [[word:shechalad|shechalad]] || [[word:kechalad|kechalad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochalad|thothochalad]] || [[word:jojochalad|jojochalad]] || [[word:shoshochalad|shoshochalad]] || [[word:kokochalad|kokochalad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochalad|thochalad]] || [[word:jochalad|jochalad]] || [[word:shochalad|shochalad]] || [[word:kochalad|kochalad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochalad|thochalad]] || [[word:jochalad|jochalad]] || [[word:shochalad|shochalad]] || [[word:kochalad|kochalad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]] || [[word:chalad|chalad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chalad|th忙chalad]] || [[word:j忙chalad|j忙chalad]] || [[word:sh忙chalad|sh忙chalad]] || [[word:k忙chalad|k忙chalad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachalad|thathachalad]] || [[word:jajachalad|jajachalad]] || [[word:shashachalad|shashachalad]] || [[word:kakachalad|kakachalad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachalad|thachalad]] || [[word:jachalad|jachalad]] || [[word:shachalad|shachalad]] || [[word:kachalad|kachalad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachalad|thachalad]] || [[word:jachalad|jachalad]] || [[word:shachalad|shachalad]] || [[word:kachalad|kachalad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachalad|shachalad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachalad|goshachalad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachalad|gokishachalad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachaladn眉|shachaladn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachaladnkn眉|goshachaladnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachaladn眉|gokishachaladn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachaladsh毛|shachaladsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachaladnksh毛|goshachaladnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachaladsh毛|gokishachaladsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachaladro|shachaladro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachaladnkro|goshachaladnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachaladro|gokishachaladro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachaladmu|shachaladmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachaladnkmu|goshachaladnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachaladmu|gokishachaladmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachaladsher|shachaladsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachaladnksher|goshachaladnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachaladsher|gokishachaladsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachaladng|shachaladng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachaladnkng|goshachaladnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachaladng|gokishachaladng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachaladya|shachaladya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachaladnkya|goshachaladnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachaladya|gokishachaladya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachaladyam|shachaladyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachaladnkyam|goshachaladnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachaladyam|gokishachaladyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachaladn眉sh毛|shachaladn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachaladnkn眉sh毛|goshachaladnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachaladn眉sh毛|gokishachaladn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachaladn眉ro|shachaladn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachaladnkn眉ro|goshachaladnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachaladn眉ro|gokishachaladn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachaladn眉mu|shachaladn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachaladnkn眉mu|goshachaladnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachaladn眉mu|gokishachaladn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachaladsh毛n眉|shachaladsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachaladnksh毛n眉|goshachaladnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachaladsh毛n眉|gokishachaladsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachaladsh毛ro|shachaladsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachaladnksh毛ro|goshachaladnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachaladsh毛ro|gokishachaladsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachaladsh毛mu|shachaladsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachaladnksh毛mu|goshachaladnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachaladsh毛mu|gokishachaladsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachaladron眉|shachaladron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachaladnkron眉|goshachaladnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachaladron眉|gokishachaladron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachaladrosh毛|shachaladrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachaladnkrosh毛|goshachaladnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachaladrosh毛|gokishachaladrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachaladromu|shachaladromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachaladnkromu|goshachaladnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachaladromu|gokishachaladromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachaladmun眉|shachaladmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachaladnkmun眉|goshachaladnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachaladmun眉|gokishachaladmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachaladmush毛|shachaladmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachaladnkmush毛|goshachaladnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachaladmush毛|gokishachaladmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachaladmuro|shachaladmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachaladnkmuro|goshachaladnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachaladmuro|gokishachaladmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
